questions.question: и®?$(\xi, \eta)$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}x+y, & 0 \leq x \leq 1,0 \leq y \leq 1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(\xi \eta)=()$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұдәҢз»ҙйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸеҮҪж•°ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣзҡ„е®ҡд№үзҹҘпјҢ
$$
E(\xi \eta)=\int_0^1 d x \int_0^1 x y(x+y) d y=\int_0^1\left(\frac{1}{2} x^2+\frac{1}{3} x\right) d x=\frac{1}{3} .
$$

questions.question: $(\xi, \eta)$ зҡ„иҒ”еҗҲжҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}x+y, & 0 \leq x \leq 1,0 \leq y \leq 1 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(\xi), E(\eta)$ еҲҶеҲ«дё?().
questions.analysis:
з”ұйўҳж„ҸзҹҘпјҢ
$$
E(\xi)=\int_0^1 d x \int_0^1 x(x+y) d y=\frac{7}{12},
$$

з”?$x$ дё?$y$ зҡ„еҜ№з§°жҖ§зҹҘ, $E(\eta)=\frac{7}{12}$.

questions.question:
и®?$(X, Y)$ зҡ„иҒ”еҗҲжҰӮзҺҮеҲҶеёғдёә
\begin{tabular}{|c||c||c||c||c|}
\hline$X \backslash Y$ & 0 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\
\hline \hline 1 & 0 & $3 / 8$ & $3 / 8$ & 0 \\
\hline \hline 3 & $1 / 8$ & 0 & 0 & $1 / 8$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

еҲ?$E(X), E(Y), E(X Y)$ еҲҶеҲ«дё?( ).
и®?$(\xi, \eta)$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}3 x, 0<y<x, 0<x<1 \\ 0, \quad \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(\xi-\eta)=()$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұдәҢз»ҙйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸзҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣзҡ„е®ҡд№үзҹҘпјҢ
$$
E(\xi-\eta)=\int_0^1 d x \int_0^x(x-y) \cdot 3 x d y=\frac{3}{8} .
$$

questions.question: и®?$X$ е’?$Y$ жҳҜзӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣдё”еқҮжңҚд»ҺжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеё?$N\left(0, \frac{1}{2}\right)$ зҡ„йҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ? еҲ?$|X-Y|$ зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣдёә ( ).
и®ҫйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮ?$X$ е’?$Y$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, дё”йғҪжңҚд»Һж ҮеҮҶжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеё? еҲ?$Z=\sqrt{X^2+Y^2}$ зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣдёә ( \quad ).
questions.analysis:
$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim N(0,1), X$ е’?$Y$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣпј?$X$ е’?$Y$ зҡ„иҒ”еҗҲжҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә
$$
f(x, y)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2 \pi}} e^{-x^2 / 2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2 \pi}} e^{-y^2 / 2}=\frac{1}{2 \pi} e^{-\left(x^2+y^2\right) / 2},
$$

дәҺжҳҜ
$$
E(Z)=E\left(\sqrt{X^2+Y^2}\right)=\frac{1}{2 \pi} \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} \sqrt{x^2+y^2} e^{-\frac{x^2+y^2}{2}} d x d y,
$$

еҲ©з”ЁжһҒеқҗж ҮжқҘи®Ўз®—, д»?$x=r \cos \theta, y=r \sin \theta$, еҫ—
$$
\begin{aligned}
E(Z) & =\frac{1}{2 \pi} \int_0^{2 \pi} \int_0^{+\infty} r^2 e^{-\frac{r^2}{2}} d r d \theta=\frac{2 \pi}{2 \pi} \int_0^{+\infty} r^2 e^{-\frac{r^2}{2}} d r \\
& =-\left.r e^{-\frac{r^2}{2}}\right|_0 ^{+\infty}+\int_0^{+\infty} e^{-\frac{r^2}{2}} d r=\sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}}\left(\text { еӣ?} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2 \pi}} \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} e^{-\frac{r^2}{2}} d r=1\right) .
\end{aligned}
$$

questions.question: и®?$(\xi, \eta)$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $\varphi(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{cc}x e^{-x(1+y)}, & x>0, y>0 \\ 0, & \text { е…¶е®ғ }\end{array}\right.$, еҲ?$E(\xi \eta)=( \quad )$.
questions.analysis:
з”ұдәҢз»ҙйҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸеҮҪж•°зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣзҡ„е®ҡд№үзҹҘ,
$$
E(\xi \eta)=\int_0^{+\infty} x e^{-x} d x \int_0^{+\infty} x y e^{-x y} d y=\int_0^{+\infty} x e^{-x} \frac{1}{x} d x=\int_0^{+\infty} e^{-x} d x=1
$$

questions.question: и®?$(X, Y)$ зҡ„жҰӮзҺҮеҜҶеәҰдёә $f(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}2,0<x<1,0<y<x \\ 0,\end{array}\right.$ е…¶е®ғ , еҲ?$E(X Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $E(X Y)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} \int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x y f(x, y) d x d y=\int_0^1 d x \int_0^x 2 x y d y=\frac{1}{4}$.

questions.question:
йҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $(X, Y)$ зҡ„иҒ”еҗҲеҲҶеёғеҫӢдёә
\begin{tabular}{r|cc}
\hline X \backslash Y & 0 & 1 \\
\hline 0 & $1 / 6$ & $1 / 6$ \\
1 & $1 / 3$ & $1 / 12$ \\
2 & $1 / 12$ & $1 / 6$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

еҲ?$E[2 \max (X, Y)+3]=()$.
questions.analysis:
\begin{tabular}{c|cccccc}
\hline$(\mathrm{X}, \mathrm{Y})$ & $(0,0)$ & $(0,1)$ & $(1,0)$ & $(1,1)$ & $(2,0)$ & $(2,1)$ \\
\hline$P$ & $1 / 6$ & $1 / 6$ & $1 / 3$ & $1 / 12$ & $1 / 12$ & $1 / 6$ \\
\hline $\max (\mathrm{X}, \mathrm{Y})$ & 0 & 1 & 1 & 1 & 2 & 2 \\
\hline $2 \max (\mathrm{X}, \mathrm{Y})+3$ & 3 & 5 & 5 & 5 & 7 & 7 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

еҚ?$2 \max (X, Y)+3$ зҡ„еҲҶеёғеҫӢдёә
\begin{tabular}{c|ccc}
\hline $2 \max (\mathrm{X}, \mathrm{Y})+3$ & 3 & 5 & 7 \\
\hline$P$ & $1 / 6$ & $7 / 12$ & $1 / 4$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

дәҺжҳҜ,
$$
E[2 \max (X, Y)+3]=3 \times \frac{1}{6}+5 \times \frac{7}{12}+7 \times \frac{1}{4}=\frac{31}{6} .
$$
